title: Video by pontusboman
description:
10 jumps, 20 shots, 4 rounds.@lara.heini 🔥
-
Physical training does not need to be, and should not be complicated. 

All of these moves are likely to happen in a game.

1) Jump up and try to catch a high ball.
2) Shortly after, an opportunity for a save appears, so you have to quickly regain your basic stance.
3) Player passes instead of shoots, or the rebound goes to the side, so you have to get there quickly for the save.

• Repeat in quick succession for 20 shots. 
• Rest for as long as it took you to do the 20 shots.
• Then go for as many rounds as you need to get your heart rate up (preferably to 90% or higher).

Why? 

Two main reasons.
Interval training is the most effective way to increase your heart and lung capacity, and the exercise forces you to keep focus even if you are exhausted.

Techniques and saves are secondary in this exercise.

Also, because it's fun 😃

Save it and try it!
